name: registry can export a current snapshot of the active sources to compliance evidence folder
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: cfpb, enabled: true}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/export-registry-snapshot.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --out compliance/pr-sources-snapshot.yaml --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'snapshot_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' compliance/pr-sources-snapshot.yaml && grep -q 'cfpb' compliance/pr-sources-snapshot.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
